verses.text: David sung panin Hebron-ah a piang tapate: Jezreel mi Ahinoam tawh a neih a tacil Ammon, Karmel numei Abigail tawh a neih a nihna Daniel
Geshur kumpipa Talmai' tanu, a nu Maakah ahi a thumna Absalom, a nu Haggith ahi a lina Adonijah
Abital tawh a neih a ngana Shefatiah, a zi Eglah tawh a neih a gukna Ithream hi a
amah in kum sagih leh kha guk sung a ukna Hebron-ah ama sung panin guk suak hi. Tua ciangin amah in Jerusalem-ah kum sawmthumlethum sung uk hi
Ama sung panin Jerusalem-ah a suakte: Shimea, Shobab, Nathan, leh Solomon hi a, Ammiel' tanu Bathsheba tawh a neih li pha hi
Tua ciangin Ibhar, Elishua, Elpelet
Nogah, Nefeg, Jafia
Elishama, Eliada, leh Elifelet, kua pha uh hi
Hihte pen a zineute' tapate simloin, David' tapate ahi hi. Tamar a kici tanu khat zong amah in neilai hi.
Solomon' suanlekhakte: Rehoboam, a tapa Abijah, a tapa Asa, a tapa Jehoshafat
a tapa Joram, a tapa Ahaziah, a tapa Joash
a tapa Amaziah, a tapa Azariah, a tapa Jotham
a tapa Ahaz, a tapa Hezekiah, a tapa Manasseh
a tapa Amon, a tapa Josiah ahi uh hi
Josiah' tapate: A tacil Johanan, a nihna Jehoiakim, a thumna Zedekiah, a lina Shallum ahi uh hi
Jehoiakim' suanlekhakte: A tapa Jehoiakhin leh Zedekiah ahi uh hi
Babylon-ah sal a suak Jehoiakhin' tapate: A tapa Shealtiel
Makhiram, Pedaiah, Shenazzar, Jekamiah, Hoshama, leh Nedabiah ahi uh hi
Pedaiah' tapate: Zerubbabel leh Shimei ahi uh hi. Zerubbabel' tapate: Meshulam leh Hananiah hi a, Shelomith kici tanu khat zong nei hi
Tua ciangin tapa dang Hashubah, Ohel, Berekhiah, Hasadiah, leh Jushabhesed, nga neilai hi
Hananiah' tapate: Pelatiah leh Jeshaiah hi a, Jeshaiah' ta Refaiah, a tapa Arnan, a tapa Obadiah, a tapa Shekaniah ahi uh hi
Shekaniah in tapa khat leh tupa nga nei a, a tapa Shemaiah ahi hi. Shemaiah tapate: Hattush, Igal, Bariah, Neariah, leh Shafat ahi uh hi
Neariah' tapate: Elioenai, Hizkiah, leh Azrikam, thum pha uh hi
Elioenai' tapate: Hodaviah, Eliashib, Pelaiah, Akkub, Johanan, Delaiah, leh Anani, sagih pha uh hi.
